target.title: #92285: fix: reconcile orphaned managed flows when all child tasks are terminal
target.body:
"## Summary

Add a new reconciliation rule in task-flow registry maintenance that transitions a managed TaskFlow to "lost" when all its linked child tasks are terminal (but no cancel was requested). This prevents parent orchestration flows from remaining permanently stale_running after a child subagent session is lost.

## Root Cause

When a subagent backing session becomes lost, the child task is correctly marked as "lost" by the task registry lifecycle listener. The child's task_mirrored flow is also synced to "lost" via `syncFlowFromTaskResult()`. However, the parent's **managed** TaskFlow (the orchestrator flow) stays "running" indefinitely because:

1. Managed flows don't auto-sync from child task status changes
2. The existing `shouldFinalizeCancelledFlow()` only applies when `cancelRequestedAt` is set
3. No reconciliation mechanism existed for the "all children terminal, flow still running" state

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** Reconcile orphaned managed TaskFlows to "lost" when all child tasks are terminal during task-flow registry maintenance, preventing parent orchestration flows from remaining permanently stale_running after backing session loss.

**Real environment tested:** Linux 4.19.112, Node.js via tsx, openclaw workspace importing the production task-flow maintenance modules.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```
$ npx tsx scripts/repro-92285.mts

=== Test 1: Orphaned managed flow reconciliation ===
  Flow created: {"id":"167a51d6-7370-4eb7-9c56-d9b4e389acb4","status":"running","syncMode":"managed"}
  Child task created: {"id":"09c62b03-9132-49a2-b478-894b3c2e40c0","status":"running","flowId":"167a51d6-7370-4eb7-9c56-d9b4e389acb4"}
  Preview (child alive): {"reconciled":0,"pruned":0}
  Child marked lost: {"id":"09c62b03-9132-49a2-b478-894b3c2e40c0","status":"lost"}
  Maintenance summary: {"reconciled":1,"pruned":0}
  Flow after maintenance: {"id":"167a51d6-7370-4eb7-9c56-d9b4e389acb4","status":"lost"}

=== Test 2: Running flow with no tasks is not touched ===
  Flow created (no tasks): {"id":"9e53f7d2-28f3-41fa-a350-2886dfaaa4d3","status":"running"}
  Maintenance summary: {"reconciled":0,"pruned":0}
  Flow after maintenance: {"id":"9e53f7d2-28f3-41fa-a350-2886dfaaa4d3","status":"running"}

=== Test 3: Queued managed flow with terminal child ===
  Flow created (queued): {"id":"465ea5a1-3a61-4324-9127-7d760f2176f8","status":"queued"}
  Child task created: {"id":"91aeeeeb-32ff-4347-8240-d2d3b22b3652","status":"running"}
  Maintenance summary: {"reconciled":1,"pruned":0}
  Flow after maintenance: {"id":"465ea5a1-3a61-4324-9127-7d760f2176f8","status":"lost"}

=== Test 4: Cancel-requested flow still finalizes as cancelled ===
  Flow created (cancel requested): {"id":"93c84313-deaa-49bb-bf6b-378f3ed213fc","status":"running"}
  Maintenance summary: {"reconciled":1,"pruned":0}
  Flow after maintenance: {"id":"93c84313-deaa-49bb-bf6b-378f3ed213fc","status":"cancelled"}

=== Results ===
Test 1 (orphaned managed flow → lost): PASS
Test 2 (empty managed flow untouched): PASS
Test 3 (queued flow with dead child → lost): PASS
Test 4 (cancel-requested flow → cancelled): PASS
```

**Evidence after fix:**
```
$ pnpm vitest run src/tasks/task-flow-registry.maintenance.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed (5)
   Start at  09:04:56
   Duration  10.45s (transform 4.05s, setup 0ms, import 7.20s, tests 2.99s, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 21.16s
```

**Observed result after fix:** The repro script confirms orphaned managed flows transition to "lost" when all child tasks are terminal. Queued flows are also handled. Cancel-requested flows still finalize as "cancelled" (existing behavior preserved). Running flows with no child tasks are left untouched.

**What was not tested:** Integration with specific task orchestration plugins; real task-flow execution lifecycle (the fix operates at the registry maintenance layer before plugin-specific hooks fire).

## Regression Test Plan

- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/tasks/task-flow-registry.maintenance.test.ts` — 5 passed
- [x] `pnpm vitest run src/tasks/task-flow-registry.test.ts` — passes
- [x] Reproducer script confirms 4/4 scenarios
- [x] Cancel-requested flow still finalizes as cancelled (regression preserved)
- [x] Empty managed flow (no child tasks) left untouched
"
target.author: pandah97
